ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "statefp" TEXT /* State FIPS code */,
  "countyfp" TEXT /* County FIPS code */,
  "shape_area" REAL /* Area of the county */,
  "shape_length" REAL /* Length of the county boundary */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "date_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "date_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, private, hospital) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "date_data_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., cases, deaths, testing) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the case belongs to */,
  "pos_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases */,
  "pos_cases_yesterday" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases yesterday */,
  "pos_cases_change" INTEGER /* Change in positive cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases */,
  "case_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Case rate per 100,000 population */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the death belongs to */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "deaths_yesterday" INTEGER /* Number of deaths yesterday */,
  "deaths_change" INTEGER /* Change in deaths */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths */,
  "death_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Death rate per 100,000 population */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the hospitalization belongs to */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "new_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of new hospitalizations reported */,
  "cumulative_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of hospitalizations */,
  "hospitalization_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Hospitalization rate per 100,000 population */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the testing event belongs to */,
  "tested" INTEGER /* Number of people tested */,
  "test_encounters" INTEGER /* Number of test encounters */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new tests conducted */,
  "cumulative_tests" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of tests conducted */,
  "testing_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Testing rate per 100,000 population */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the outbreak belongs to */,
  "number_of_outbreaks" INTEGER /* Number of outbreaks */,
  "new_outbreaks" INTEGER /* Number of new outbreaks reported */,
  "cumulative_outbreaks" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of outbreaks */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreaks_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_data" (
  "state_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the state data belongs to */,
  "pos_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases in the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "rate_per_100000" REAL /* Rate of positive cases per 100,000 people in the state */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the state */,
  "cdc_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the state according to the CDC */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases in the state */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths in the state */,
  "cumulative_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of hospitalizations in the state */,
  "cumulative_tests" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of tests conducted in the state */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_pos_cases_over_time" (
  "county_pos_cases_over_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county positive cases over time entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the county positive cases over time belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date */,
  "pos_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases in the county on the given date */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases on the given date */,
  "case_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Case rate per 100,000 population on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_pos_cases_over_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_pos_cases_over_time_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_deaths_over_time" (
  "county_deaths_over_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county deaths over time entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the county deaths over time belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the county on the given date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the given date */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths on the given date */,
  "death_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Death rate per 100,000 population on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_deaths_over_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_deaths_over_time_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
